nasb.text: For Your lovingkindness toward me is great, And You have delivered my soul from the depths of Sheol.

esv.text: For great is your steadfast love toward me; you have delivered my soul from the depths of Sheol.

cnv.text: 因為你向我大施慈愛， 你救了我的命，免入陰間的深處。

ccb.text: 因为你深爱我， 从阴间的深处拯救了我。

csbs.text: 因为你对我的慈爱浩大， 你解救了我的灵魂，脱离极深的阴间。
